[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 110011111 7
2 100101001 4
3 100011000 3
4 000010011 3
5 110000101 4
6 110110010 5
7 111101000 5

47 74 111111111 a match 0
